title: Steadefi - REKT
relevance_summary: Deployer address compromise followed by owner-only actions like transferring vault ownership and pausing farms

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers ownership of a vault contract
Block any tx that pauses a farms contract

summary: Steadefi lost $1.14M when the deployer address was compromised, allowing the attacker to transfer vault ownership and pause farms. A guard could have blocked these actions.
